note: Places where low-level Supabase access is legitimate. Every entry is a specific path or module boundary, never a wildcard over src. Adding an entry is a review decision, not a way to silence the guard.

exceptions.reason: Client bootstrap. This is the module every other exception is defined relative to.
Session and sign-out infrastructure. Operates on auth rather than feature data.
Account administration and managed child sessions: privileged operations that are not a feature domain.
Dedicated realtime infrastructure. Owns .channel() so feature code does not have to.
Repository implementations. This is the layer the guard is steering everything towards.
Offline-first shopping repository, already on the target pattern.
Offline calendar repository and its sync adapter, already on the target pattern.
Per-feature data layer introduced by the repository waves.
Per-feature remote adapters, e.g. the Family Jump score remote.
